## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] No secrets or real tenant/owner/financial/Google data added (placeholders only)
- [ ] Updated README/docs if setup steps or env vars changed
- [ ] Keeps Google Drive/Sheets as the source of truth and stays within the
      front-end wedge (no accounting/payments/portal scope creep)
